trans-unit.id: Currently, you can only get Now Playing from Apple Music, because it's a native system call without the integration of any third-party components. There is no point in getting Now Playing from Spotify since it requires jumping from a bunch more hoops, and the widget doesn't refresh enough for it to be worth it.
trans-unit.source: Currently, you can only get Now Playing from Apple Music, because it's a native system call without the integration of any third-party components. There is no point in getting Now Playing from Spotify since it requires jumping from a bunch more hoops, and the widget doesn't refresh enough for it to be worth it.
trans-unit.target: 目前，您只能从 Apple Music 获取正在播放信息，因为这是原生的系统调用，无需集成任何第三方组件。从 Spotify 获取正在播放毫无意义，因为这需要经历更多繁琐的步骤，而且小组件的刷新频率也不足以让这值得一试。

trans-unit.id: If none of the above helped, then the problem is that your Widgy reached the miserly small iOS memory limit. Try hiding some of the image and symbol layers and checking out if the widget now loads on the Home screen. If that helped, now you at least know the cause of the problem.
trans-unit.source: If none of the above helped, then the problem is that your Widgy reached the miserly small iOS memory limit. Try hiding some of the image and symbol layers and checking out if the widget now loads on the Home screen. If that helped, now you at least know the cause of the problem.
trans-unit.target: 如果以上方法都无效，则问题在于您的 Widgy 达到了 iOS 极低的内存限制。请尝试隐藏一些图像和符号图层，然后检查小组件是否能在主屏幕正常加载。如果这样有效，现在您至少知道问题的原因了。

trans-unit.id: If sync seems to hang, wake up your Watch, so Watchy is visible on screen.
trans-unit.source: If sync seems to hang, wake up your Watch, so Watchy is visible on screen.
trans-unit.target: 如果同步看上去被挂起，请唤醒您的 Watch，以便 Watchy 在屏幕上可见。

trans-unit.id: If that doesn't help, try restarting your device a couple of times.
trans-unit.source: If that doesn't help, try restarting your device a couple of times.
trans-unit.target: 如果这样仍无效，请尝试将您的设备重启几次。

trans-unit.id: If that happens, the widget on the home screen won't load and will look broken.
trans-unit.source: If that happens, the widget on the home screen won't load and will look broken.
trans-unit.target: 如果发生这种情况，主屏幕上的小组件可能无法加载或者可能显示异常。

trans-unit.id: If the sync fails, troubleshoot via the Help section in Widgy.
trans-unit.source: If the sync fails, troubleshoot via the Help section in Widgy.
trans-unit.target: 如果同步失败，请通过 Widgy「帮助」页面进行故障排查。

trans-unit.id: If there are any conflicts between new and old values, do the following:
trans-unit.source: If there are any conflicts between new and old values, do the following:
trans-unit.target: 如果新值和旧值之间存在任何冲突，执行以下操作：

trans-unit.id: If you are wondering why the live timer updates every second, but not anything else, it's because Apple provided that one feature as an exception. Widgy is using that feature as time since 0:00 (24 hour time) or 12:00 am/pm (12 hour time).
trans-unit.source: If you are wondering why the live timer updates every second, but not anything else, it's because Apple provided that one feature as an exception. Widgy is using that feature as time since 0:00 (24 hour time) or 12:00 am/pm (12 hour time).
trans-unit.target: 如果您在疑惑为什么实时计时器可以每秒更新，但别的不行，这是因为 Apple 为该功能单独提供了例外权限。Widgy 正在利用这一特性，将其作为从 0:00（24 小时制）或 12:00 am/pm（12 小时制）开始的时间来使用。

trans-unit.id: If you encounter an error during sync, just try again—it often resolves itself.
trans-unit.source: If you encounter an error during sync, just try again—it often resolves itself.
trans-unit.target: 如果同步过程中遇到错误，请重试 - 通常它自己就解决了。

trans-unit.id: If you have 50k or more followers and wish to promote the app in exchange for full version unlock, please contact me.
trans-unit.source: If you have 50k or more followers and wish to promote the app in exchange for full version unlock, please contact me.
trans-unit.target: 如果您拥有 50K+ 粉丝，并希望推广该 App 以换取完整版解锁，请与我联系。

trans-unit.id: If you love Widgy so much that you consider donating, feel free to pick your tip.

trans-unit.id: If you'd like to use the new iOS 17 widget reload, which doesn't open the Widgy app, make sure that 'Widget Action' is set to 'Reload Widget' or 'Button', 'Vibrate' is either set to 'No' or 'Yes', and 'External Action' is set to 'Return To Home Screen'. Also, this won't work on Live Activities and Dynamic Island.
trans-unit.source: If you'd like to use the new iOS 17 widget reload, which doesn't open the Widgy app, make sure that 'Widget Action' is set to 'Reload Widget' or 'Button', 'Vibrate' is either set to 'No' or 'Yes', and 'External Action' is set to 'Return To Home Screen'. Also, this won't work on Live Activities and Dynamic Island.
trans-unit.target: 如果您想使用 iOS 17 新的小组件重新加载方式（不会打开 Widgy App），请确保「小组件操作」设置为「重新加载小组件」或「按钮」，「震动」设置为「否」或「是」，以及「外部操作」设置为「返回主屏幕」。此外，这不适用于实时活动和灵动岛。

trans-unit.id: If you'd like to use the new iOS 17 widget reload, which doesn't open the Widgy app, make sure that 'Widget Action' is set to 'Reload Widget' or 'Button', 'Vibrate' is either set to 'No' or 'Yes', and 'External Action' is set to 'Return To Home Screen'. Also, this won't work on Live Activities, Dynamic Island and PiP Buttons.
trans-unit.source: If you'd like to use the new iOS 17 widget reload, which doesn't open the Widgy app, make sure that 'Widget Action' is set to 'Reload Widget' or 'Button', 'Vibrate' is either set to 'No' or 'Yes', and 'External Action' is set to 'Return To Home Screen'. Also, this won't work on Live Activities, Dynamic Island and PiP Buttons.
trans-unit.target: 如果您想使用 iOS 17 新的小组件重新加载方式（不会打开 Widgy App），请确保「小组件操作」设置为「重新加载小组件」或「按钮」，「震动」设置为「否」或「是」，以及「外部操作」设置为「返回主屏幕」。此外，这不适用于实时活动、灵动岛和画中画按钮。

trans-unit.id: To make returning to Watchy simpler, Watchy offers complications (Apple Watch Face 'Widgets') of all sizes that just lead you back to the Watchy app. So after adding those complications to your stock Watch Face, in the worst case you're a tap away from Watchy.
trans-unit.source: To make returning to Watchy simpler, Watchy offers complications (Apple Watch Face 'Widgets') of all sizes that just lead you back to the Watchy app. So after adding those complications to your stock Watch Face, in the worst case you're a tap away from Watchy.

trans-unit.id: To make returning to Watchy simpler, Watchy offers complications (Apple Watch Face 'Widgets') of all sizes, that just lead you back to Watchy app. So after adding those complications to your stock Watch Face, in the worst case you're a tap away from Watchy and custom 'Watch Faces'.
trans-unit.source: To make returning to Watchy simpler, Watchy offers complications (Apple Watch Face 'Widgets') of all sizes, that just lead you back to Watchy app. So after adding those complications to your stock Watch Face, in the worst case you're a tap away from Watchy and custom 'Watch Faces'.

trans-unit.note: In-App Purchase Messages Widget Slot Name

trans-unit.id: Watchy is only available on the latest major watchOS version, so be sure you're up to date with system updates.
trans-unit.source: Watchy is only available on the latest major watchOS version, so be sure you're up to date with system updates.
trans-unit.target: Watchy 仅适用于最新的主 watchOS 版本，因此请确保您的系统已更新至最新版本。

trans-unit.id: Watchy isn't a complete replacement for stock Apple Watch Watch Faces, since there are no developer APIs to make them stay as permanent Watch Faces.
trans-unit.source: Watchy isn't a complete replacement for stock Apple Watch Watch Faces, since there are no developer APIs to make them stay as permanent Watch Faces.
trans-unit.target: Watchy 并不能完全替代原生 Apple Watch 表盘，因为目前没有开发者 API 支持将其设为永久性的表盘。

trans-unit.id: Watchy requires various permissions; depending on the type of data that is being displayed on the current Watch Face.
trans-unit.source: Watchy requires various permissions; depending on the type of data that is being displayed on the current Watch Face.
trans-unit.target: Watchy 需要各种权限；取决于当前表盘上显示的数据类型。

trans-unit.id: Watchy should be opened and visible on screen during the Sync.
trans-unit.source: Watchy should be opened and visible on screen during the Sync.
trans-unit.target: 同步期间，Watchy 应该已打开并在屏幕上可见了。

trans-unit.id: Watchy supports custom date formatting with a build-in 'dateFormatter()' and 'localizedDateFormatter()' methods, in the same format as the Text layers custom date.
trans-unit.source: Watchy supports custom date formatting with a build-in 'dateFormatter()' and 'localizedDateFormatter()' methods, in the same format as the Text layers custom date.
trans-unit.target: Watchy 支持自定义日期格式，可使用内置的「dateFormatter()」和「localizedDateFormatter()」方法，其格式与文本图层的自定义日期格式相同。

trans-unit.id: Watchy uses a different Javascript runtime so some results may differ from the Widgys Javascript.
trans-unit.source: Watchy uses a different Javascript runtime so some results may differ from the Widgys Javascript.
trans-unit.target: Watchy 使用的是不同的 Javascript 运行时，因此某些结果可能与 Widgy Javascript 不同。

trans-unit.id: We've opened the translation process up to the community because you know best how Widgy should be translated into your language. Please follow the instructions written on the translation page.
trans-unit.source: We've opened the translation process up to the community because you know best how Widgy should be translated into your language. Please follow the instructions written on the translation page.
trans-unit.target: 我们向社区开放了翻译流程，因为您最清楚如何将 Widgy 翻译成您的语言。请遵循翻译页面上的说明进行操作。
欢迎使用 Widgy 编辑器

trans-unit.id: When designing your Watch Face, use the dual light/dark mode colors. On Watchy dark mode colors are being used when Always On Display is enabled.
trans-unit.source: When designing your Watch Face, use the dual light/dark mode colors. On Watchy dark mode colors are being used when Always On Display is enabled.
trans-unit.target: 设计您的表盘时，请使用浅色/深色双模式颜色。启用全天候显示时，Watchy 会使用深色模式颜色。

trans-unit.id: While in low power mode, Widgets refresh less frequent.
trans-unit.source: While in low power mode, Widgets refresh less frequent.
trans-unit.target: 在低电量模式下，小组件刷新的频率较低。

trans-unit.id: While widgets can't be natively transparent, you can place a special 'Transparent widget' image on the bottom layer of your widget.
trans-unit.source: While widgets can't be natively transparent, you can place a special 'Transparent widget' image on the bottom layer of your widget.
trans-unit.target: 虽然小组件无法原生实现透明效果，但您可以在小组件的底层放置一张特殊的「透明小组件」图像。

trans-unit.id: While widgets can't be natively transparent, you can place an image on the bottom layer of your widget that is a cropped version of your wallpaper. Widgy has an crop tool that can help you with this.
trans-unit.source: While widgets can't be natively transparent, you can place an image on the bottom layer of your widget that is a cropped version of your wallpaper. Widgy has an crop tool that can help you with this.
trans-unit.target: 虽然小组件无法原生实现透明效果，但您可以在小组件的底层放置一张裁剪版本的墙纸图像。Widgy 提供了裁剪工具，可帮助您完成此操作。

trans-unit.id: Widgets are limited to a budget of just 30 MB of system memory. Adding a Dark Mode variant of the image increases the chances of overflowing that memory budget.
trans-unit.source: Widgets are limited to a budget of just 30 MB of system memory. Adding a Dark Mode variant of the image increases the chances of overflowing that memory budget.
trans-unit.target: 小组件的系统内存配额限制为仅 30 MB。为图片添加深色模式变体，会增加超出该内存配额的风险。

trans-unit.id: Widgets can fetch data every 15 minutes (that includes various things like Battery Status, Weather, Agenda, and Health).
trans-unit.source: Widgets can fetch data every 15 minutes (that includes various things like Battery Status, Weather, Agenda, and Health).
trans-unit.target: 小组件可以每 15 分钟获取一次数据（包括电池状态、天气、日程和健康等）。

trans-unit.id: Widgets can update the display every minute. That means widgets can show the correct date and time, but other information will have a 15-minute 'lag'.
trans-unit.source: Widgets can update the display every minute. That means widgets can show the correct date and time, but other information will have a 15-minute 'lag'.
trans-unit.target: 小组件可以每分钟更新一次显示。这意味着小组件可以显示正确的日期和时间，但其他信息会有 15 分钟的「滞后」。

trans-unit.id: Widgy will automatically reload all live activities when switching to the app. You can also add a reload tap action to the live activity to make it reloadable on a simple tap. Thanks to iOS 17, the widget will reload in place.
trans-unit.source: Widgy will automatically reload all live activities when switching to the app. You can also add a reload tap action to the live activity to make it reloadable on a simple tap. Thanks to iOS 17, the widget will reload in place.

trans-unit.id: Widgy will sort all Tap Actions alphabetically and use whatever comes up first.
trans-unit.source: Widgy will sort all Tap Actions alphabetically and use whatever comes up first.

trans-unit.source: Woodsign may use third-party services to collect data about your device and your usage of Widgy and use it to improve the application experience and stability.

trans-unit.id: You can disable Always On Display from the Watch Settings menu. Open the Settings app on your Apple Watch, go to Display & Brightness, and toggle the 'Always On' option.
trans-unit.source: You can disable Always On Display from the Watch Settings menu. Open the Settings app on your Apple Watch, go to Display & Brightness, and toggle the 'Always On' option.

trans-unit.source: You can import any file made in Widgy. The importer won't convert the file to any other format (for example Widgy to Watchy).

trans-unit.id: You can resize the drawer to any size.
trans-unit.source: You can resize the drawer to any size.
trans-unit.target: 您可以将抽屉调整为任意尺寸。

trans-unit.id: You can use the || delimiter both in source and target to replace multiple strings at the same time.
trans-unit.source: You can use the || delimiter both in source and target to replace multiple strings at the same time.
trans-unit.target: 您可以在源字符串和目标字符串中同时使用 || 分隔符，以一次性替换多个字符串。

trans-unit.source: You'll need to switch between this app and your browser to copy and paste the required information.
trans-unit.target: 您需要在此 App 和浏览器之间切换，以拷贝并粘贴所需信息。

trans-unit.id: iOS 18.1 has introduced dynamic recoloring of wallpapers, which is not compatible with Widgy’s transparency feature. To address this issue, please set your wallpaper using the shortcut provided below.
trans-unit.source: iOS 18.1 has introduced dynamic recoloring of wallpapers, which is not compatible with Widgy’s transparency feature. To address this issue, please set your wallpaper using the shortcut provided below.
trans-unit.target: iOS 18.1 引入了墙纸动态重新着色功能，这与 Widgy 的透明功能不兼容。为解决此问题，请使用下方提供的快捷指令来设置墙纸。

trans-unit.id: iPad users, take note! Widgets don't know the orientation of your device. In other words, you can have transparency either for portrait or landscape orientation BUT NOT FOR BOTH. Rotating your device will break the illusion of transparency.
trans-unit.source: iPad users, take note! Widgets don't know the orientation of your device. In other words, you can have transparency either for portrait or landscape orientation BUT NOT FOR BOTH. Rotating your device will break the illusion of transparency.
trans-unit.target: iPad 用户请注意！小组件无法识别设备方向。换句话说，透明效果只能适用于纵向或横向其中一种方向，无法同时支持两者。旋转设备会破坏透明效果的视觉伪装。
